query:
SELECT ap.id, ap.alunoId, ap.turmaId, ap.trilhaId, ap.status, 
       t.name as turmaNome, tr.name as trilhaNome
FROM assessment_pdi ap
LEFT JOIN turmas t ON ap.turmaId = t.id
LEFT JOIN trilhas tr ON ap.trilhaId = tr.id
WHERE ap.alunoId = 30040
ORDER BY ap.id;
